zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Hotham II於1262年出生在英國越可爾貝弗利時，他的父親John de Holtom26歲，母親Alicia Stafford23歲。他和Agnes Daniel至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1348年在英國越可爾享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Hotham II于1262年出生在英国越可爾貝弗利时，他的父亲John de Holtom26岁，母亲Alicia Stafford23岁。他和Agnes Daniel至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1348年在英国越可爾享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hotham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): habitational name usually from Hotham (East Yorkshire), but occasionally perhaps also from Holtham in Legsby (Lincolnshire). The East Yorkshire placename may derive from Old English hōdum, dative plural form of hōd ‘shelter’, while the origin of the Lincolnshire placename is uncertain. Compare Holtham .

variants.name: Holtham
meanings: habitational name from a place so named or a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) enclosure in the wood’, from Middle English holt ‘wood, grove’ + ham ‘enclosure’ (Old English holt + hamm). Compare Haltom and Holtom .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Hotham II was born in 1262, in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, his father, John de Holtom, was 26 and his mother, Alicia Stafford, was 23. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Agnes Daniel. He died in 1348, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Hotham II est né en 1262, à Beverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Holtom, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alicia Stafford, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes Daniel. Il est décédé en 1348, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Hotham II 1262 in Beverley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Holtom 26 und seine Mutter Alicia Stafford 23. Er hatte mit Agnes Daniel mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1348 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Hotham II è nato il nel 1262 nel Beverley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John de Holtom, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Alicia Stafford, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Agnes Daniel. Morì nel 1348, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Hotham IIが1262年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベバーリーで生まれた時，父John de Holtomは26歳，母Alicia Staffordは23歳であった。彼はAgnes Danielとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1348年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Hotham II(이)가 1262년 영국 요르크실르 베벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Holtom(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia Stafford(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Agnes Daniel(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1348년 영국 요르크실르에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Hotham II nasceu em 1262, em Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Holtom, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alicia Stafford, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Agnes Daniel. Ele faleceu em 1348, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Hotham II родился в 1262 г. в местности бивирли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Holtom было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alicia Stafford, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Agnes Daniel. Он умер в 1348 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Hotham II nació en 1262, en Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Holtom, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alicia Stafford, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Agnes Daniel. Murió en 1348, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años.
